generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed surface temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time heatbed temperature data stream transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time internal air temperature data stream transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time external air temperature data stream transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed heatbed temperature readings for thermal modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, TemperaturePredictionEnabler, SafetyMonitoringEnabler, PredictiveControlEnabler
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed internal air temperature readings for thermal modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, TemperaturePredictionEnabler, SafetyMonitoringEnabler, PredictiveControlEnabler
]

instance ExternalAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed external air temperature readings for thermal modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, TemperaturePredictionEnabler, SafetyMonitoringEnabler, PredictiveControlEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat retention"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal models for temperature trend prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance SafetyMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring system for operational deviations and safety checks"

]

instance PredictiveControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation-based predictive control for maintaining target temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveControlService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]

instance PythonInterpreter : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language for implementing thermal models and services"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code verification and community reuse"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]

]

]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Simulation-based recommendations for maintaining target temperatures"
]

    base:desc "Controller commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes actuation through MOSFET-based PCB circuitry to regulate thermal output and airflow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models interacting via message-passing architecture, with DT components listening to RabbitMQ messages for real-time synchronization with the physical twin."
]

    base:desc "Operated phase (as deployed system), with models integrated post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control as specified in 'Once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin (DT).'"

]

]
